Control Description: Establish cybersecurity policies specific to healthcare data protection
Designate healthcare cybersecurity leadership with appropriate authority
Implement healthcare-specific risk management processes
Encrypt all protected health information at rest
Enforce TLS 1.2+ for all PHI transmissions
Implement role-based access for PHI with least privilege
Apply data masking for PHI in non-production environments
Log all PHI access and modifications
Implement MFA for all users accessing PHI
Implement just-in-time access for privileged clinical system operations
Implement strong patient identity verification mechanisms
Manage and secure clinician credentials and digital certificates
Segment clinical networks from administrative and guest networks
Isolate medical devices on dedicated network segments
Secure healthcare APIs (FHIR, HL7) with authentication and encryption
Implement security controls for telehealth platforms
Secure EHR systems with encryption and access controls
Harden clinical applications against common vulnerabilities
Secure medical imaging systems (PACS/DICOM) with encryption and access controls
Implement security controls for laboratory information systems
Maintain inventory of all connected medical devices
Implement patch management for medical devices with vendor coordination
Monitor medical device security events and anomalies
Implement incident response procedures for medical device security events
Classify healthcare data by sensitivity and regulatory requirements
Define retention periods for clinical data per regulatory requirements
Implement de-identification for research data use
Implement backup and recovery for critical healthcare data
Maintain HIPAA compliance for PHI handling
Implement comprehensive audit logging per healthcare regulations
Implement procedures for healthcare data breach notification
Implement processes for patient privacy rights (access, correction, deletion)
Ensure high availability for critical clinical systems
Implement emergency access procedures for clinical systems
Test disaster recovery for healthcare systems regularly
Implement failover capabilities for critical clinical systems
